code:
%%{Infra_LoadBalancer}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (Infra_WorkerNode)

[Infra_WorkerNode] --> DRAFT : ProposalCreated (Infra_WorkerNode)
note right of DRAFT
  Authoring & validation:
  • proposalId assigned
  • schema/policy checks
end note

DRAFT --> REVIEW : SubmittedForReview
note right of REVIEW
  Guard reviews (Infra_LoadBalancer)
  Can request changes or reject
end note

REVIEW --> DRAFT : ChangesRequested
REVIEW --> REJECTED : RejectedAtReview
REVIEW --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : ApprovedForVoting (Infra_RedisCache)

OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : VoteCast (Infra_LoadBalancer)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> TALLYING : VotingClosed

TALLYING --> DECIDED_APPROVED : VoteTallied → Approved (Infra_LoadBalancer)
TALLYING --> DECIDED_REJECTED : VoteTallied → Rejected (Infra_LoadBalancer)

DECIDED_APPROVED --> EXECUTION : DecisionRecorded (Infra_WorkerNode)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> ARCHIVED : DecisionRecorded (Infra_RedisCache)

EXECUTION --> EXECUTED : PolicyChanged / GrantApproved / ProjectApproved (Infra_IngressController)
EXECUTION --> EXECUTION_FAILED : ExecutionFailed

EXECUTION_FAILED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Infra_LoadBalancer)
EXECUTION_FAILED --> RETRY_EXEC : RetryAuthorized
RETRY_EXEC --> EXECUTION : ReExecute

EXECUTED --> AUDIT : ExecutionCompleted
AUDIT --> ARCHIVED : AuditLogged (Infra_RedisCache)

%% Appeals (Infra_IngressController)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Infra_LoadBalancer)
DECIDED_APPROVED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Infra_WorkerNode)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Infra_LoadBalancer)

APPEAL --> DECIDED_APPROVED : AppealResolved → uphold
APPEAL --> DECIDED_REJECTED : AppealResolved → overturn
APPEAL --> ARCHIVED : AppealWithdrawn

%% Cancellations
DRAFT --> CANCELLED : WithdrawnByAuthor
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> CANCELLED : CancelledByAuthority
CANCELLED --> ARCHIVED : Archived

%% Terminal states
REJECTED --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
ARCHIVED --> [Infra_IngressController]

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,REVIEW,OPEN_FOR_VOTE,TALLYING,DECIDED_APPROVED,DECIDED_REJECTED,EXECUTION,EXECUTED,EXECUTION_FAILED,RETRY_EXEC,APPEAL,AUDIT,ARCHIVED,REJECTED,CANCELLED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为提案生命周期设计一个完整的状态图，从创建到最终归档。核心流程是：提案先进入DRAFT状态，作者在这里完成编写和验证，然后提交审核。
明白了。DRAFT阶段需要标注哪些细节？我看到有proposalId分配和策略检查。另外，审核环节是由Infra_LoadBalancer处理吗？
对，DRAFT在Infra_WorkerNode上创建，审核阶段由Infra_LoadBalancer做负载均衡。审核员可以要求修改、直接拒绝，或者批准进入投票。
好的，我已经把DRAFT到REVIEW的主流程画出来了，包括打回修改和拒绝的分支。接下来是投票阶段？
是的，ApprovedForVoting会触发Infra_RedisCache缓存投票配置。OPEN_FOR_VOTE状态要支持多次投票，所以有个自循环的VoteCast事件，也是走Infra_LoadBalancer。
自循环我记下了。投票结束后进入计票状态？然后怎么分流到最终决议？
对，TALLYING之后VoteTallied事件分流：通过走DECIDED_APPROVED，否决走DECIDED_REJECTED，都由Infra_LoadBalancer处理结果通知。
计票和决议分支已添加。DECIDED_APPROVED之后进入执行阶段？
DECIDED_APPROVED的DecisionRecorded在Infra_WorkerNode上记录，然后进入EXECUTION。执行成功会触发实际业务动作：策略变更、拨款或项目批准，这些走Infra_IngressController。
执行失败的情况呢？需要重试机制吗？
需要。ExecutionFailed进入EXECUTION_FAILED，这里可以走两条路：一是打开申诉AppealOpened，二是授权重试RetryAuthorized进入RETRY_EXEC，然后重新执行。
执行失败分支和重试循环已画好。执行成功后呢？
EXECUTED先到AUDIT完成审计，然后AuditLogged在Infra_RedisCache记录后归档到ARCHIVED。DECIDED_REJECTED也是DecisionRecorded后直接归档。
申诉机制似乎不止执行失败能触发？我注意到DECIDED_APPROVED和DECIDED_REJECTED也应该能打开申诉？
完全正确。申诉入口有三处：OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段、DECIDED_APPROVED和DECIDED_REJECTED都能AppealOpened，分别由Infra_LoadBalancer或Infra_WorkerNode触发。
申诉入口都补充了。申诉的决议结果怎么设计？
申诉解决后AppealResolved有两个走向：维持原判回到DECIDED_APPROVED，或者推翻原判到DECIDED_REJECTED。另外申诉也可以主动撤回直接归档。
好的。还有取消机制吗？比如作者中途想撤回？
有两个取消场景。DRAFT阶段作者可以WithdrawnByAuthor主动撤回；OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段权威机构可以CancelledByAuthority强制取消。取消后都进入ARCHIVED。
取消分支已添加。终端状态需要特殊标注吗？
REJECTED和ARCHIVED是终端状态。REJECTED回到Infra_LoadBalancer做资源释放，ARCHIVED走Infra_IngressController做最终归档通知。
终端状态连线已完成。我注意到DECIDED_REJECTED的DecisionRecorded标注的是Infra_RedisCache，但之前DECIDED_APPROVED是Infra_WorkerNode，需要统一吗？
不需要统一，这是设计意图。批准决议需要WorkerNode做事务性记录，否决决议用RedisCache做轻量缓存即可。保持现状。
理解了。所有核心状态需要统一视觉样式吗？
是的，所有业务状态用橙色高亮。包括DRAFT、REVIEW、OPEN_FOR_VOTE、TALLYING、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED、EXECUTION、EXECUTED、EXECUTION_FAILED、RETRY_EXEC、APPEAL、AUDIT、ARCHIVED、REJECTED、CANCELLED。
样式类已应用。让我再核对一下：Infra_WorkerNode作为起始节点，ProposalCreated触发DRAFT，这个对吗？
对，整个生命周期从Infra_WorkerNode开始，ProposalCreated事件创建提案进入DRAFT。图标题用SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (Infra_WorkerNode)。
标题已设置。我注意到REVIEW的备注提到Guard reviews，需要明确是Infra_LoadBalancer吗？
是的，REVIEW阶段的Guard reviews由Infra_LoadBalancer处理，可以要求修改或拒绝。DRAFT的备注也要保留：proposalId分配和schema/policy检查。
备注都已添加。整体结构检查完毕：主流程、审核分支、投票循环、计票分流、执行与重试、申诉多入口、取消机制、终端状态，以及基础设施标注都完整了。
很好。最后确认一下：EXECUTED到AUDIT的流转是ExecutionCompleted，然后AUDIT到ARCHIVED是AuditLogged，这些事件名都正确？
确认无误，所有事件名称已核对。状态图SM-03.01已完成，包含完整的提案生命周期、基础设施依赖标注和视觉样式。
